meta.title: Tax Credit Transfer and Syndication Pricing Watchlist
meta.methodology: Prices are dollars paid per $1.00 of federal tax credit face value. Verified ranges are recorded only where a fetchable public source stated the range; otherwise the price fields remain null with status VERIFY.

markets.label: Transferable clean-energy credits
markets.source_note: Crux 2026 guide states buyers typically purchase transferable tax credits at $0.90-$0.95 per $1.00 of credit.

markets.label: Investment-grade ITC transfers
markets.source_note: Crux 2026 guide summarizes 2025 investment-grade ITC pricing range.

markets.label: Investment-grade PTC transfers
markets.source_note: Crux 2026 guide summarizes 2025 investment-grade PTC pricing range.

markets.label: New Markets Tax Credit equity pricing
markets.source_note: Official CDFI Fund program page verifies the program but does not publish current cents-per-credit market pricing. Leave pricing null until a fetchable pricing source is read.

markets.label: Federal Historic Tax Credit syndication pricing
markets.source_note: Official NPS tax incentives page verifies the federal HTC program but does not publish current cents-per-credit market pricing. Leave pricing null until a fetchable pricing source is read.
